description:
Undertale Yellow is a fangame based on Undertale where every choice you make matters. Join Clover on a trip throughout new parts
 of the underground, joined by many new characters. Of course, all the routes present in Undertale are also present here.

Release.description: First Alpha Release, please report any bugs to me!
Release.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1

v0.1.1.description:
Bugfix Release, both updated game files and apworld (so make sure to download both!)

CHANGELOG
-Fixed a bug where you could spawn inside a sweet corn and be unable to move when using the snowdin warp door
-Fixed a minor bug where the three musicians would appear twice in Honeydew Inn in pacifist/neutral and not appear in genocide
-Fixed a minor logic error where Dunes Key could land on Axis Genocide Victory if both LOVE and Stat rando were turned off (logically Dunes Key is expected so you have enough available levels to reasonably fight Axis)
v0.1.1.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1.1

v0.1.2.description:
Bugfix Release, both updated game files and apworld (so make sure to download both!)

CHANGELOG
-fixed a bug where progressive ammo and armor setting would break if love rando and stat rando were off or not applicable
-fixed a bug where the flowey cut scene in steamworks room 4 (neutral) would start playing in the credits of the neutral run if that save file had not yet gone there normally.
-changed LOVE, HP Up, and ATK Up to be deprioritized and balancing skipped progression items.
v0.1.2.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1.2

v0.1.3.description:
Update including more bug fixes and a new option! (YOU WILL NEED TO UPDATE ALL FILES FOR THIS UPDATE)

CHANGELOG:
-Fixed several crashes
-Fixed logic errors where various pacifist/neutral exclusive checks were appearing on genocide runs
-Added a new option: Reduce Grinds. This option halves the amount of enemies you need to kill per area in a genocide run, and in return doubles the amount of experience basic enemies gives. This should make all routes a bit more sync friendly.
-Properly made it so that hp is restored slightly when getting an HP Up.
v0.1.3.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1.3

v0.1.4.description:
Major bugfix release, most bugs found in past versions have been fixed. (YOU WILL NEED TO UPDATE ALL FILES FOR THIS RELEASE)

CHANGELOG:
-Added new PP and SP Filler items. PP is Protection Point that blocks one hit, and SP gives you a speed boost for a turn.
-Fixed a bug where the Steamworks Mail Station right before axis wasn't properly being added to the fast travel list
-Fixed a bug where Fast Travel wasn't properly resetting encounter tables, leading to encounters in the wrong area.
-Fixed a bug where some NPCs would appear in places they shouldn't normally be.
-Fixed a bug where Ceroba would appear in the HUB after the final cutscene in the Dunes
-Fixed a logic error where New Home would appear in logic early in pacifist depending on your Rando Love and Rando Stat settings
-Fixed a bug where dying and hitting continue would send out post-boss checks despite losing the fight
-Added a check for the Feisty Slider Barrel in Wild East (didnt know that one existed lmao)
-ITEM Button is now logically expected for Zenith Martlet
-Other fixes I didnt have written down

KNOWN ISSUES:
Crashes have been reported after the Axis and Starlo fights, I have yet to be able to reproduce these. If this occurs for you please let me know what you did.
v0.1.4.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1.4

v0.1.5.description:
Bugfix Release, both AP World and Game Files need to be downloaded

CHANGES:
-Genocide Martlet (Snowdin) now logically requires 6 ATK/HP upgrades or 6 LOVE depending on settings
-A new Mail Station has been added right outside the Dunes Mines. This allows for quick fast travel back to use the Pickaxe once you receive it.

BUGFIXES:
-Refixed a bug where certain pacifist/neutral checks were coming into logic in genocide
-Fixed a bug where natural deaths would not allow you to retry after receiving a deathlink (deathlink deaths will not allow you to retry regardless)
-Fixed a bug where you could open the menu on the game over screen after receiving a deathlink
-Fixed a bug where you could receive items on the game over screen after receiving a deathlink
-Fixed a coding mistake that prevented PP and SP Junk items from actually being in the multiworld
-Potentially fixed a bug where receiving an item right during a room transition could potentially lock movement until another item is received. (This ones hard to test so I'm unsure if I fully fixed it yet)

OTHER:
-Gave Flowey unique lines for a Deathlink death
v0.1.5.title: Undertale Yellow AP v0.1.5
